data.description: Multi-CLI environment switcher for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode with API proxy auto-failover. - GoZen/README.md at main · dopejs/GoZen

  left: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: #0076ff;
  z-index: 2147483647;
  transition:
    width 300ms ease-out,
    opacity 150ms 150ms ease-in;
  transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
}
</style>

access\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eWeb UI Security\u003c/strong\u003e — Auto-generated access password, session-based auth, RSA encryption for token AES-256-GCM encryption\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eVersion Update Check\u003c/strong\u003e — Automatic non-blocking check for new versions on startup (24h cache)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSelf-Update\u003c/strong\u003e — One-command upgrade via \u003ccode\u003ezen upgrade\u003c/code\u003e with semver version matching (supports both the HTTP proxy and the Web UI:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eProxy server\u003c/strong\u003e runs on port \u003ccode\u003e19841\u003c/code\u003e (configurable via \u003ccode\u003eproxy_port\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eWeb UI\u003c/strong\u003e runs on port \u003ccode\u003e19840\u003c/code\u003e (configurable via \u003ccode\u003eweb_port\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eThe daemon starts automatically when you run \u003ccode\u003ezen\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003ezen web\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eConfig changes are hot-reloaded via file watching\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSync auto-push (debounced 2s) and auto-pull are handled by the daemon\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"# Manual status\n\n# System service (auto-start on boot)\nzen daemon enable         # Install as system service\nzen daemon disable        # Remove system service\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan GoZen","","\u003cp align=\"center\"\u003e","  \u003cimg src=\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dopejs/GoZen/main/assets/gozen.svg\" alt=\"GoZen Logo\" width=\"120\"\u003e","\u003c/p\u003e","","[简体中文](docs/README.zh-CN.md) | [繁體中文](docs/README.zh-TW.md) | [Español](docs/README.es.md)","","\u003e **Go Zen** — enter a zen-like flow state for programming. **Goes Env** — seamless environment switching.","","Multi-CLI environment switcher for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode with API proxy auto-failover.","","## Features","","- **Multi-CLI Support** — Supports Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode, configurable per project","- **Multi-Config Management** — Manage all API configurations in `~/.zen/zen.json`","- **Unified Daemon** — Single `zend` process hosts both the proxy server and the Web UI","- **Proxy Failover** — Built-in HTTP proxy that automatically switches to backup providers when the primary is unavailable","- **Scenario Routing** — Intelligent routing based on request characteristics (thinking, image, longContext, etc.)","- **Project Bindings** — Bind directories to specific profiles and CLIs for project-level auto-configuration","- **Environment Variables** — Configure CLI-specific environment variables at the provider level","- **Web Management UI** — Browser-based visual management with password-protected access","- **Web UI Security** — Auto-generated access password, session-based auth, RSA encryption for token transport","- **Config Sync** — Sync providers, profiles, and settings across devices via WebDAV, S3, GitHub Gist, or GitHub Repo with AES-256-GCM encryption","- **Version Update Check** — Automatic non-blocking check for new versions on startup (24h cache)","- **Self-Update** — One-command upgrade via `zen upgrade` with semver version matching (supports prerelease versions)","- **Shell Completion** — Supports zsh / bash / fish","","### v3.0 New Features","","- **Usage Tracking** — Track token usage and costs per provider, model, and project","- **Budget Control** — Set daily/weekly/monthly spending limits with warn/downgrade/block actions","- **Provider Health Monitoring** — Real-time health checks with latency and error rate tracking","- **Smart Load Balancing** — Multiple strategies: failover, round-robin, least-latency, least-cost","- **Webhooks** — Notifications for budget alerts, provider status changes, and daily summaries (Slack/Discord/Generic)","- **Context Compression** — Automatic context compression when token count exceeds threshold","- **Middleware Pipeline** — Pluggable middleware for request/response transformation","- **Agent Infrastructure** — Built-in support for agent-based workflows with session management","- **Bot Gateway** — Monitor and control Claude Code sessions remotely via Telegram, Discord, Slack, Lark, or Facebook Messenger","","## Installation","","```sh","curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dopejs/gozen/main/install.sh | sh","```","","Uninstall:","","```sh","curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dopejs/gozen/main/uninstall.sh | sh","```","","## Quick Start","","```sh","# Add your first provider","zen config add provider","","# Launch (using default profile)","zen","","# Use a specific profile","zen -p work","","# Use a specific CLI","zen --cli codex","```","","## Command Reference","","| Command | Description |","|---------|-------------|","| `zen` | Launch CLI (using project binding or default config) |","| `zen -p \u003cprofile\u003e` | Launch with a specific profile |","| `zen -p` | Interactively select a profile |","| `zen --cli \u003ccli\u003e` | Use a specific CLI (claude/codex/opencode) |","| `zen -y` / `zen --yes` | Auto-approve CLI permissions (claude `--permission-mode bypassPermissions`, codex `-a never`) |","| `zen -- \u003cflags\u003e` | Pass extra flags directly to the CLI client |","| `zen use \u003cprovider\u003e` | Directly use a specific provider (no proxy) |","| `zen pick` | Interactively select a provider to launch |","| `zen list` | List all providers and profiles |","| `zen config` | Show config subcommands |","| `zen config add provider` | Add a new provider |","| `zen config add profile` | Add a new profile |","| `zen config default-client` | Set the default CLI client |","| `zen config default-profile` | Set the default profile |","| `zen config reset-password` | Reset the Web UI access password |","| `zen config sync` | Pull config from remote sync backend |","| `zen daemon start` | Start the zend daemon |","| `zen daemon stop` | Stop the daemon |","| `zen daemon restart` | Restart the daemon |","| `zen daemon status` | Show daemon status |","| `zen daemon enable` | Install daemon as system service |","| `zen daemon disable` | Uninstall daemon system service |","| `zen bind \u003cprofile\u003e` | Bind current directory to a profile |","| `zen bind --cli \u003ccli\u003e` | Bind current directory to a specific CLI |","| `zen unbind` | Remove binding for current directory |","| `zen status` | Show binding status for current directory |","| `zen web` | Open the Web management UI in browser |","| `zen upgrade` | Upgrade to the latest version |","| `zen version` | Show version |","","## Daemon Architecture","","In v3.0, GoZen uses a unified daemon process (`zend`) that hosts both the HTTP proxy and the Web UI:","","- **Proxy server** runs on port `19841` (configurable via `proxy_port`)","- **Web UI** runs on port `19840` (configurable via `web_port`)","- The daemon starts automatically when you run `zen` or `zen web`","- Config changes are hot-reloaded via file watching","- Sync auto-push (debounced 2s) and auto-pull are handled by the daemon","","```sh","# Manual daemon management","zen daemon start          # Start the daemon","zen daemon stop           # Stop the daemon","zen daemon restart        # Restart the daemon","zen daemon status         # Check daemon status","","# System service (auto-start on boot)","zen daemon enable         # Install as system service","zen daemon disable        # Remove system service","```","","## Multi-CLI Support","","zen supports three AI coding assistant CLIs:","","| CLI | Description | API Format |","|-----|-------------|------------|","| `claude` | Claude Code (default) | Anthropic Messages API |","| `codex` | OpenAI Codex CLI | OpenAI Chat Completions API |","| `opencode` | OpenCode | Anthropic / OpenAI |","","### Set Default CLI","","```sh","zen config default-client","","# Or via Web UI","zen web  # Settings page","```","","### Per-Project CLI","","```sh","cd ~/work/project","zen bind --cli codex  # Use Codex for this directory","```","","### Temporary CLI Override","","```sh","zen --cli opencode  # Use OpenCode for this session","```","","## Profile Management","","A profile is an ordered list of providers used for failover.","","### Configuration Example","","```json","{","  \"profiles\": {","    \"default\": {","      \"providers\": [\"anthropic-main\", \"anthropic-backup\"]","    },","    \"work\": {","      \"providers\": [\"company-api\"],","      \"routing\": {","        \"think\": {\"providers\": [{\"name\": \"thinking-api\"}]}","      }","    }","  }","}","```","","### Using Profiles","","```sh","# Use default profile","zen","","# Use a specific profile","zen -p work","","# Interactive selection","zen -p","```","","## Project Bindings","","Bind directories to specific profiles and/or CLIs for project-level auto-configuration.","","```sh","cd ~/work/company-project","","# Bind profile","zen bind work-profile","","# Bind CLI","zen bind --cli codex","","# Bind both","zen bind work-profile --cli codex","","# Check status","zen status","","# Remove binding","zen unbind","```","","**Priority**: Command-line args \u003e Project binding \u003e Global default","","## Web Management UI","","```sh","# Open in browser (auto-starts daemon if needed)","zen web","```","","Web UI features:","- Provider and Profile management","- Project binding management","- Global settings (default client, default profile, ports)","- Config sync settings","- Request log viewer with auto-refresh","- Model field autocomplete","","### Web UI Security","","When the daemon starts for the first time, it auto-generates an access password. Non-local requests (outside 127.0.0.1/::1) require login.","","- **Session-based auth** with configurable expiry","- **Brute-force protection** with exponential backoff","- **RSA encryption** for sensitive token transport (API keys encrypted in-browser before sending)","- Local access (127.0.0.1) bypasses authentication","","```sh","# Reset the Web UI password","zen config reset-password","","# Change password via Web UI","zen web  # Settings → Change Password","```","","## Config Sync","","Sync providers, profiles, default profile, and default client across devices. Auth tokens are encrypted with AES-256-GCM (PBKDF2-SHA256 key derivation) before upload.","","Supported backends:","- **WebDAV** — Any WebDAV server (e.g. Nextcloud, ownCloud)","- **S3** — AWS S3 or S3-compatible storage (e.g. MinIO, Cloudflare R2)","- **GitHub Gist** — Private gist (requires PAT with `gist` scope)","- **GitHub Repo** — Repository file via Contents API (requires PAT with `repo` scope)","","### Setup via Web UI","","```sh","zen web  # Settings → Config Sync","```","","### Manual Pull via CLI","","```sh","zen config sync","```","","### Conflict Resolution","","- Per-entity timestamp merge: newer modification wins","- Deleted entities use tombstones (expire after 30 days)","- Scalars (default profile/client): newer timestamp wins","","## Environment Variables","","Each provider can have CLI-specific environment variables:","","```json","{","  \"providers\": {","    \"my-provider\": {","      \"base_url\": \"https://api.example.com\",","      \"auth_token\": \"sk-xxx\",","      \"claude_env_vars\": {","        \"CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS\": \"64000\",","        \"MAX_THINKING_TOKENS\": \"50000\"","      },","      \"codex_env_vars\": {","        \"CODEX_SOME_VAR\": \"value\"","      },","      \"opencode_env_vars\": {","        \"OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_OUTPUT_TOKEN_MAX\": \"64000\"","      }","    }","  }","}","```","","### Common Claude Code Environment Variables","","| Variable | Description |","|----------|-------------|","| `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS` | Max output tokens |","| `MAX_THINKING_TOKENS` | Extended thinking budget |","| `ANTHROPIC_MAX_CONTEXT_WINDOW` | Max context window |","| `BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS` | Bash default timeout |","","## Scenario Routing","","Automatically route requests to different providers based on request characteristics:","","| Scenario | Trigger Condition |","|----------|-------------------|","| `think` | Thinking mode enabled |","| `image` | Contains image content |","| `longContext` | Content exceeds threshold |","| `webSearch` | Uses web_search tool |","| `background` | Uses Haiku model |","","**Fallback mechanism**: If all providers in a scenario config fail, it automatically falls back to the profile's default providers.","","Configuration example:","","```json","{","  \"profiles\": {","    \"smart\": {","      \"providers\": [\"main-api\"],","      \"long_context_threshold\": 60000,","      \"routing\": {","        \"think\": {","          \"providers\": [{\"name\": \"thinking-api\", \"model\": \"claude-opus-4-5\"}]","        },","        \"longContext\": {","          \"providers\": [{\"name\": \"long-context-api\"}]","        }","      }","    }","  }","}","```","","## Usage Tracking \u0026 Budget Control","","Track API usage and set spending limits:","","```json","{","  \"pricing\": {","    \"claude-sonnet-4-20250514\": {\"input_per_million\": 3.0, \"output_per_million\": 15.0},","    \"claude-opus-4-20250514\": {\"input_per_million\": 15.0, \"output_per_million\": 75.0}","  },","  \"budgets\": {","    \"daily\": {\"amount\": 10.0, \"action\": \"warn\"},","    \"monthly\": {\"amount\": 100.0, \"action\": \"block\"},","    \"per_project\": true","  }","}","```","","Budget actions: `warn` (log warning), `downgrade` (switch to cheaper model), `block` (reject requests).","","## Provider Health Monitoring","","Automatic health checks with metrics tracking:","","```json","{","  \"health_check\": {","    \"enabled\": true,","    \"interval_secs\": 60,","    \"timeout_secs\": 10","  }","}","```","","View provider health via Web UI or API: `GET /api/v1/health/providers`","","## Smart Load Balancing","","Configure load balancing strategy per profile:","","```json","{","  \"profiles\": {","    \"balanced\": {","      \"providers\": [\"provider-a\", \"provider-b\", \"provider-c\"],","      \"strategy\": \"least-latency\"","    }","  }","}","```","","Strategies:","- `failover` — Try providers in order (default)","- `round-robin` — Distribute requests evenly","- `least-latency` — Route to fastest provider","- `least-cost` — Route to cheapest provider for the model","","## Webhooks","","Get notified about important events:","","```json","{","  \"webhooks\": [","    {","      \"name\": \"slack-alerts\",","      \"url\": \"https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx\",","      \"events\": [\"budget_warning\", \"budget_exceeded\", \"provider_down\", \"provider_up\"],","      \"enabled\": true","    }","  ]","}","```","","Events: `budget_warning`, `budget_exceeded`, `provider_down`, `provider_up`, `failover`, `daily_summary`","","## Context Compression","","Automatically compress context when it exceeds a threshold:","","```json","{","  \"compression\": {","    \"enabled\": true,","    \"threshold_tokens\": 100000,","    \"target_ratio\": 0.5","  }","}","```","","## Middleware Pipeline","","Transform requests and responses with pluggable middleware:","","```json","{","  \"middleware\": {","    \"enabled\": true,","    \"middlewares\": [","      {\"name\": \"context-injection\", \"enabled\": true, \"config\": {\"inject_cursorrules\": true}},","      {\"name\": \"rate-limiter\", \"enabled\": true, \"config\": {\"requests_per_minute\": 60}}","    ]","  }","}","```","","Built-in middleware: `context-injection`, `request-logger`, `rate-limiter`, `compression`","","## Bot Gateway","","Monitor and control your Claude Code sessions remotely via chat platforms. The bot connects to running `zen` processes via IPC and lets you:","","- View connected processes and their status","- Send tasks to specific processes","- Receive notifications for approvals, errors, and completions","- Control tasks (pause/resume/cancel)","","### Supported Platforms","","| Platform | Setup Required |","|----------|----------------|","| Telegram | BotFather token |","| Discord | Bot application token |","| Slack | Bot + App tokens (Socket Mode) |","| Lark/Feishu | App ID + Secret |","| Facebook Messenger | Page token + Verify token |","","### Bot Commands","","| Command | Description |","|---------|-------------|","| `list` | List all connected processes |","| `status [name]` | Show process status |","| `bind \u003cname\u003e` | Bind to a process for subsequent commands |","| `pause/resume/cancel [name]` | Control tasks |","| `\u003cname\u003e \u003ctask\u003e` | Send a task to a process |","| `help` | Show available commands |","","The bot also understands natural language queries like \"帮我看看 gozen 的状态\" (show me gozen's status).","","### Configuration","","```json","{","  \"bot\": {","    \"enabled\": true,","    \"socket_path\": \"/tmp/zen-bot.sock\",","    \"platforms\": {","      \"telegram\": {","        \"enabled\": true,","        \"token\": \"123456:ABC-DEF...\",","        \"allowed_users\": [\"your_username\"]","      }","    },","    \"interaction\": {","      \"require_mention\": true,","      \"mention_keywords\": [\"@zen\", \"/zen\"],","      \"direct_message_mode\": \"always\",","      \"channel_mode\": \"mention\"","    },","    \"aliases\": {","      \"api\": \"/path/to/api-project\",","      \"web\": \"/path/to/web-project\"","    }","  }","}","```","","See the [Bot Gateway documentation](https://gozen.dev/docs/bot) for detailed platform setup guides.","","## Config Files","","| File | Description |","|------|-------------|","| `~/.zen/zen.json` | Main configuration file |","| `~/.zen/zend.log` | Daemon log |","| `~/.zen/zend.pid` | Daemon PID file |","| `~/.zen/logs.db` | Request log database (SQLite) |","","### Full Configuration Example","","```json","{","  \"version\": 8,","  \"default_profile\": \"default\",","  \"default_client\": \"claude\",","  \"proxy_port\": 19841,","  \"web_port\": 19840,","  \"providers\": {","    \"anthropic\": {","      \"base_url\": \"https://api.anthropic.com\",","      \"auth_token\": \"sk-ant-xxx\",","      \"model\": \"claude-sonnet-4-5\",","      \"claude_env_vars\": {","        \"CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS\": \"64000\"","      }","    }","  },","  \"profiles\": {","    \"default\": {","      \"providers\": [\"anthropic\"]","    }","  },","  \"project_bindings\": {","    \"/path/to/project\": {","      \"profile\": \"work\",","      \"client\": \"codex\"","    }","  }","}","```","","## Upgrade","","```sh","# Latest version","zen upgrade","","# Specific version","zen upgrade 3.0","zen upgrade 3.0.0","","# Prerelease version","zen upgrade 3.0.0-alpha.1","```","","## Migrating from Older Versions","","GoZen automatically migrates configurations from previous versions:","- `~/.opencc/opencc.json` → `~/.zen/zen.json` (from OpenCC v1.x)","- `~/.cc_envs/` → `~/.zen/zen.json` (from legacy format)","","## Development","","```sh","# Install Git hooks (branch naming validation)","./scripts/install-hooks.sh","","# Build","go build -o zen .","","# Test","go test ./...","```","","**Branch Naming Convention**: All feature branches must follow the format `\u003ctype\u003e/\u003cdescription\u003e` where type is one of: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `refactor`, `test`, `chore`, `perf`, `ci`, `build`, `revert`. Examples: `feat/user-auth`, `fix/payment-bug`.","","Release: Push a tag and GitHub Actions will build automatically.","","```sh","git tag v3.0.0","git push origin v3.0.0","```","","## <p align="center" dir="auto">
  <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dopejs/GoZen/main/assets/gozen.svg"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dopejs/GoZen/main/assets/gozen.svg" alt="GoZen Logo" width="120" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>

<p dir="auto"><a href="/dopejs/GoZen/blob/main/docs/README.zh-CN.md">简体中文</a> | <a href="/dopejs/GoZen/blob/main/docs/README.zh-TW.md">繁體中文</a> | <a href="/dopejs/GoZen/blob/main/docs/README.es.md">Español</a></p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Go Zen</strong> — enter a zen-like flow state for programming. <strong>Goes Env</strong> — seamless environment switching.</p>
</blockquote>
<p dir="auto">Multi-CLI environment switcher for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode with API proxy auto-failover.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Features</h2><a id="user-content-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Features" href="#features"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Multi-CLI Support</strong> — Supports Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode, configurable per project</li>
<li><strong>Multi-Config Management</strong> — Manage all API configurations in <code>~/.zen/zen.json</code></li>
<li><strong>Unified Daemon</strong> — Single <code>zend</code> process hosts both the proxy server and the Web UI</li>
<li><strong>Proxy Failover</strong> — Built-in HTTP proxy that automatically switches to backup providers when the primary is unavailable</li>
<li><strong>Scenario Routing</strong> — Intelligent routing based on request characteristics (thinking, image, longContext, etc.)</li>
<li><strong>Project Bindings</strong> — Bind directories to specific profiles and CLIs for project-level auto-configuration</li>
<li><strong>Environment Variables</strong> — Configure CLI-specific environment variables at the provider level</li>
<li><strong>Web Management UI</strong> — Browser-based visual management with password-protected access</li>
<li><strong>Web UI Security</strong> — Auto-generated access password, session-based auth, RSA encryption for token transport</li>
<li><strong>Config Sync</strong> — Sync providers, profiles, and settings across devices via WebDAV, S3, GitHub Gist, or GitHub Repo with AES-256-GCM encryption</li>
<li><strong>Version Update Check</strong> — Automatic non-blocking check for new versions on startup (24h cache)</li>
<li><strong>Self-Update</strong> — One-command upgrade via <code>zen upgrade</code> with semver version matching (supports prerelease versions)</li>
<li><strong>Shell Completion</strong> — Supports zsh / bash / fish</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">v3.0 New Features</h3><a id="user-content-v30-new-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: v3.0 New Features" href="#v30-new-features"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Usage Tracking</strong> — Track token usage and costs per provider, model, and project</li>
<li><strong>Budget Control</strong> — Set daily/weekly/monthly spending limits with warn/downgrade/block actions</li>
<li><strong>Provider Health Monitoring</strong> — Real-time health checks with latency and error rate tracking</li>
<li><strong>Smart Load Balancing</strong> — Multiple strategies: failover, round-robin, least-latency, least-cost</li>
<li><strong>Webhooks</strong> — Notifications for budget alerts, provider status changes, and daily summaries (Slack/Discord/Generic)</li>
<li><strong>Context Compression</strong> — Automatic context compression when token count exceeds threshold</li>
<li><strong>Middleware Pipeline</strong> — Pluggable middleware for request/response transformation</li>
<li><strong>Agent Infrastructure</strong> — Built-in support for agent-based workflows with session management</li>
<li><strong>Bot Gateway</strong> — Monitor and control Claude Code sessions remotely via Telegram, Discord, Slack, Lark, or Facebook Messenger</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Quick Start</h2><a id="user-content-quick-start" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Quick Start" href="#quick-start"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Add your first provider</span>
zen config add provider

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Launch (using default profile)</span>
zen

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Use a specific profile</span>
zen -p work

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Daemon Architecture</h2><a id="user-content-daemon-architecture" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Daemon Architecture" href="#daemon-architecture"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">In v3.0, GoZen uses a unified daemon process (<code>zend</code>) that hosts both the HTTP proxy and the Web UI:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Proxy server</strong> runs on port <code>19841</code> (configurable via <code>proxy_port</code>)</li>
<li><strong>Web UI</strong> runs on port <code>19840</code> (configurable via <code>web_port</code>)</li>
<li>The daemon starts automatically when you run <code>zen</code> or <code>zen web</code></li>
<li>Config changes are hot-reloaded via file watching</li>
<li>Sync auto-push (debounced 2s) and auto-pull are handled by the daemon</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Manual daemon management</span>
zen daemon start          <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Start the daemon</span>
zen daemon stop           <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Stop the daemon</span>
zen daemon restart        <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Restart the daemon</span>
zen daemon status         <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Check daemon status</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> System service (auto-start on boot)</span>
zen daemon <span class="pl-c1">enable</span>         <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Install as system service</span>
zen daemon disable        <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Remove system service</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# Manual daemon management
zen daemon start          # Start the daemon
zen daemon stop           # Stop the daemon
zen daemon restart        # Restart the daemon
zen daemon status         # Check daemon status

# System service (auto-start on boot)
zen daemon enable         # Install as system service
zen daemon disable        # Remove system service" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" data-component="Octicon" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">

<p dir="auto">zen supports three AI coding assistant CLIs:</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>CLI</th>
<th>Description</th>
<th>API Format</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>claude</code></td>
<td>Claude Code (default)</td>
<td>Anthropic Messages API</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>codex</code></td>
<td>OpenAI Codex CLI</td>
<td>OpenAI Chat Completions API</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>opencode</code></td>
<td>OpenCode</td>
<td>Anthropic / OpenAI</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Project Bindings</h2><a id="user-content-project-bindings" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Project Bindings" href="#project-bindings"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Bind directories to specific profiles and/or CLIs for project-level auto-configuration.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c1">cd</span> <span class="pl-k">~</span>/work/company-project

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Bind profile</span>
zen <span class="pl-c1">bind</span> work-profile

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Bind CLI</span>
zen <span class="pl-c1">bind</span> --cli codex

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Bind both</span>
zen <span class="pl-c1">bind</span> work-profile --cli codex

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Check status</span>
zen status

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Remove binding</span>
zen unbind</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="cd ~/work/company-project

# Bind profile
zen bind work-profile

# Bind CLI
zen bind --cli codex

# Bind both
zen bind work-profile --cli codex

# Check status
zen status

# Remove binding
zen unbind" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Web UI features:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Provider and Profile management</li>
<li>Project binding management</li>
<li>Global settings (default client, default profile, ports)</li>
<li>Config sync settings</li>
<li>Request log viewer with auto-refresh</li>
<li>Model field autocomplete</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Web UI Security</h3><a id="user-content-web-ui-security" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Web UI Security" href="#web-ui-security"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">When the daemon starts for the first time, it auto-generates an access password. Non-local requests (outside 127.0.0.1/::1) require login.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Session-based auth</strong> with configurable expiry</li>
<li><strong>Brute-force protection</strong> with exponential backoff</li>
<li><strong>RSA encryption</strong> for sensitive token transport (API keys encrypted in-browser before sending)</li>
<li>Local access (127.0.0.1) bypasses authentication</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Reset the Web UI password</span>
zen config reset-password

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Change password via Web UI</span>
zen web  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Settings → Change Password</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# Reset the Web UI password
zen config reset-password

# Change password via Web UI
zen web  # Settings → Change Password" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Config Sync</h2><a id="user-content-config-sync" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Config Sync" href="#config-sync"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Sync providers, profiles, default profile, and default client across devices. Auth tokens are encrypted with AES-256-GCM (PBKDF2-SHA256 key derivation) before upload.</p>
<p dir="auto">Supported backends:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>WebDAV</strong> — Any WebDAV server (e.g. Nextcloud, ownCloud)</li>
<li><strong>S3</strong> — AWS S3 or S3-compatible storage (e.g. MinIO, Cloudflare R2)</li>
<li><strong>GitHub Gist</strong> — Private gist (requires PAT with <code>gist</code> scope)</li>
<li><strong>GitHub Repo</strong> — Repository file via Contents API (requires PAT with <code>repo</code> scope)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Setup via Web UI</h3><a id="user-content-setup-via-web-ui" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Setup via Web UI" href="#setup-via-web-ui"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Conflict Resolution</h3><a id="user-content-conflict-resolution" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Conflict Resolution" href="#conflict-resolution"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Per-entity timestamp merge: newer modification wins</li>
<li>Deleted entities use tombstones (expire after 30 days)</li>
<li>Scalars (default profile/client): newer timestamp wins</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Environment Variables</h2><a id="user-content-environment-variables" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Environment Variables" href="#environment-variables"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Each provider can have CLI-specific environment variables:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"providers"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"my-provider"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"base_url"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>https://api.example.com<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"auth_token"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>sk-xxx<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"claude_env_vars"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>64000<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"MAX_THINKING_TOKENS"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>50000<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"codex_env_vars"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"CODEX_SOME_VAR"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>value<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      },
      <span class="pl-ent">"opencode_env_vars"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_OUTPUT_TOKEN_MAX"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>64000<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    }
  }
}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="{

}" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Common Claude Code Environment Variables</h3><a id="user-content-common-claude-code-environment-variables" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Common Claude Code Environment Variables" href="#common-claude-code-environment-variables"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>

</tr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Scenario Routing</h2><a id="user-content-scenario-routing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Scenario Routing" href="#scenario-routing"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Automatically route requests to different providers based on request characteristics:</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Scenario</th>
<th>Trigger Condition</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>think</code></td>
<td>Thinking mode enabled</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>image</code></td>
<td>Contains image content</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>longContext</code></td>
<td>Content exceeds threshold</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>webSearch</code></td>
<td>Uses web_search tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>background</code></td>
<td>Uses Haiku model</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Fallback mechanism</strong>: If all providers in a scenario config fail, it automatically falls back to the profile's default providers.</p>
<p dir="auto">Configuration example:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"profiles"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"smart"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"providers"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>main-api<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"long_context_threshold"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">60000</span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"routing"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"think"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"providers"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>thinking-api<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"model"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>claude-opus-4-5<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}]
        },
        <span class="pl-ent">"longContext"</span>: {
          <span class="pl-ent">"providers"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>long-context-api<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>}]
        }
      }
    }
  }
}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="{
  "profiles": {
    "smart": {
      "providers": ["main-api"],
      "long_context_threshold": 60000,
      "routing": {
        "think": {
          "providers": [{"name": "thinking-api", "model": "claude-opus-4-5"}]
        },
        "longContext": {
          "providers": [{"name": "long-context-api"}]
        }
      }
    }
  }
}" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Strategies:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>failover</code> — Try providers in order (default)</li>
<li><code>round-robin</code> — Distribute requests evenly</li>
<li><code>least-latency</code> — Route to fastest provider</li>
<li><code>least-cost</code> — Route to cheapest provider for the model</li>
</ul>

<p dir="auto">Transform requests and responses with pluggable middleware:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"middleware"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"enabled"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>,

      {<span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>context-injection<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"enabled"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>, <span class="pl-ent">"config"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"inject_cursorrules"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>}},
      {<span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>rate-limiter<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"enabled"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>, <span class="pl-ent">"config"</span>: {<span class="pl-ent">"requests_per_minute"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">60</span>}}
    ]
  }
}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto">Built-in middleware: <code>context-injection</code>, <code>request-logger</code>, <code>rate-limiter</code>, <code>compression</code></p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bot Gateway</h2><a id="user-content-bot-gateway" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bot Gateway" href="#bot-gateway"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Monitor and control your Claude Code sessions remotely via chat platforms. The bot connects to running <code>zen</code> processes via IPC and lets you:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>View connected processes and their status</li>
<li>Send tasks to specific processes</li>
<li>Receive notifications for approvals, errors, and completions</li>
<li>Control tasks (pause/resume/cancel)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Supported Platforms</h3><a id="user-content-supported-platforms" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Supported Platforms" href="#supported-platforms"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bot Commands</h3><a id="user-content-bot-commands" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bot Commands" href="#bot-commands"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Command</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>list</code></td>
<td>List all connected processes</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>status [name]</code></td>
<td>Show process status</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bind <name></code></td>
<td>Bind to a process for subsequent commands</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>pause/resume/cancel [name]</code></td>
<td>Control tasks</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code><name> <task></code></td>
<td>Send a task to a process</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>help</code></td>
<td>Show available commands</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">The bot also understands natural language queries like "帮我看看 gozen 的状态" (show me gozen's status).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Configuration</h3><a id="user-content-configuration" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Configuration" href="#configuration"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"bot"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"enabled"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"socket_path"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>/tmp/zen-bot.sock<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"platforms"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"telegram"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"enabled"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"token"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>123456:ABC-DEF...<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
        <span class="pl-ent">"allowed_users"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>your_username<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>]
      }
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"interaction"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"require_mention"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"mention_keywords"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>@zen<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>/zen<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
      <span class="pl-ent">"direct_message_mode"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>always<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"channel_mode"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>mention<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    },
    <span class="pl-ent">"aliases"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"api"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>/path/to/api-project<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"web"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>/path/to/web-project<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  }
}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"version"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">8</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"default_profile"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>default<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"default_client"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>claude<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"proxy_port"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">19841</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"web_port"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">19840</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"providers"</span>: {

      <span class="pl-ent">"base_url"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>https://api.anthropic.com<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"auth_token"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>sk-ant-xxx<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"model"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>claude-sonnet-4-5<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"claude_env_vars"</span>: {
        <span class="pl-ent">"CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>64000<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
      }
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"profiles"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"default"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"providers"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>anthropic<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>]
    }
  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"project_bindings"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"/path/to/project"</span>: {
      <span class="pl-ent">"profile"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>work<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
      <span class="pl-ent">"client"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>codex<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
    }
  }
}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto">GoZen automatically migrates configurations from previous versions:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>~/.opencc/opencc.json</code> → <code>~/.zen/zen.json</code> (from OpenCC v1.x)</li>
<li><code>~/.cc_envs/</code> → <code>~/.zen/zen.json</code> (from legacy format)</li>
</ul>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Branch Naming Convention</strong>: All feature branches must follow the format <code><type>/<description></code> where type is one of: <code>feat</code>, <code>fix</code>, <code>docs</code>, <code>refactor</code>, <code>test</code>, <code>chore</code>, <code>perf</code>, <code>ci</code>, <code>build</code>, <code>revert</code>. Examples: <code>feat/user-auth</code>, <code>fix/payment-bug</code>.</p>
<p dir="auto">Release: Push a tag and GitHub Actions will build automatically.</p>
